summary: Egypt uses tariff codes with up to 12 digits (HS 6-digit base with 6 additional Egyptian-specific digits). Tariff information available through Federation of Egyptian Industries (FEI).

sources.name: FEI Tariff Search
sources.description: Federation of Egyptian Industries tariff search system. Accepts HS codes from 2-12 digits.

sources.name: Egypt Tariff Schedule - World Bank WITS
sources.description: World Bank's tariff database with Egyptian schedules

sources.name: Egypt ERA HS Code Portal
sources.description: Egypt Economic Development Authority HS code information

sources.name: QIZ HS Code Query System
sources.description: Qualified Industrial Zones HS code query tool

sources.name: FedEx Egypt - HS Code Information
sources.description: Guide to HS codes for Egyptian shipping

sources.name: WTO - Egypt Tariff Profile
sources.description: WTO member tariff information for Egypt

next_steps: Access FEI tariff search at http://www.fei.org.eg/tariff/
Extract duty rates for all codes
Cross-reference with World Bank WITS for validation
notes: FEI is primary source for Egyptian tariff information. System accepts variable-length codes (2-12 digits). May require iteration through all possible codes to create comprehensive database. Alternative access through Egypt Economic Development Authority and QIZ portals.
